from source import shunting_yard

def test_shunting_yard_simple_addition():
    tokens = [1, '+', 2]
    expected = [1, 2, '+']
    actual = shunting_yard(tokens)
    assert actual == expected, (
        f"Expected {expected} but got {actual}. "
        "This reveals the missing opstack.append(token) bug."
    )
